Job_description: Join zMed and shape healthcare software interfaces. Utilize your expertise in React, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive design to create seamless user experiences. Transform design concepts into intuitive web applications that streamline healthcare workflows. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to bridge design and functionality, making a meaningful impact on healthcare technology.

Join zMed's core software team to dive into the heart of healthcare innovation. Your expertise in Python, device communication, and Kafka will play a pivotal role in optimizing data management. Tackle device driver development, server-side intricacies, and transport protocols, ensuring robust healthcare solutions. With a relentless commitment to problem-solving, you'll be at the forefront of building transformative healthcare technology.

As a QA and Testing Specialist, you will ensure the quality and reliability of our healthcare software solutions. Utilize tools like Selenium and more to perform rigorous testing, identify defects, and enhance the user experience. Collaborate closely with development teams to maintain high software standards

Lead zMed's healthcare software projects to success. Coordinate cross-functional teams, manage timelines, and ensure on-budget delivery. Your expertise in project planning, risk management, and communication will be instrumental in shaping innovative solutions. Drive the advancement of healthcare technology while making a real impact on patient care.

Your proficiency in NodeJS, MongoDB, React, and Flutter will power our cutting-edge solutions. With expertise in Python, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and a deep understanding of both front-end and back-end development, you'll play a pivotal role. Join our dynamic team to craft responsive healthcare applications, tackle complex challenges. If you're passionate about technology this role offers an exciting opportunity to make a difference.

Mobile App Developer specializing in Flutter and be at the forefront of healthcare app innovation. Leverage your expertise in Flutter to craft responsive and intuitive mobile applications. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance the user experience, streamlining healthcare workflows, and making a meaningful impact on patient care.

Join zMed as a Product Manager with a deep understanding of healthcare standards. Lead the development of healthcare software solutions that adhere to HL7, FHIR, ICD10, LOINC, SNOMED CT, and HIPAA. Drive innovation in healthcare technology by ensuring compliance and seamless integration with industry standards, ultimately improving patient care.
